title: Custom Crossbow Sounds
description:
рҹҸ№ Custom Crossbow Sounds
рҹҺҜ Get audio & visual notifications the moment your crossbow bolt lands on an enemy вҖ” never miss a hit again!
рҹ”Ҡ Custom hit sounds
рҹ–јпёҸ Arrow display on screen
вҡЎ Two different charge indicator styles
вҡҷпёҸ Version: 1.21.11 | Fabric |
body:
# рҹҸ№ __**Custom Crossbow Sounds**__

вңЁ Crossbow Sounds enhances your crossbow experience in Minecraft with both **audio and visual notifications** when you hit an enemy with a crossbow bolt!

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

рҹ”” __**Hit Notifications**__

Get instant audio and visual feedback every time your crossbow bolt lands on an enemy. Choose between **custom sounds** or the built-in default sounds, and freely adjust the volume to your liking.

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

рҹҸ№ __**Arrow Display**__

See exactly which arrow is loaded inside your crossbow directly from your inventory. If your crossbow contains a different type of arrow, it will be displayed alongside it as well.

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

рҹҺҜ __**Crossbow Charge Indicator**__

Two styles to choose from while charging your crossbow:

рҹҚ• **Style 1** вҖ” A pizza-slice shaped indicator below your crosshair
вӯ• **Style 2** вҖ” A donut-shaped ring around your crosshair

Press **O** to toggle between indicator positions!

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

вҡҷпёҸ __**Mod Menu Support**__

Customize everything directly from the Mod Menu settings:
вң… Toggle each feature on or off
вң… Resize indicators
вң… Adjust transparency

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
